channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Rubio says the US will drop Ukraine-Russia peace efforts if no progress within days
item.description: PARIS (AP) — U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio said Friday that the U.S. may “move on” from trying to secure a Russia-Ukraine peace deal if there is no progress in the coming days, after months of efforts have failed to bring an end to the fighting.
item.dc:creator: ANGELA CHARLTON and HANNA ARHIROVA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Rubio says the US will drop Ukraine-Russia peace efforts if no progress within days
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio says the U.S. may “move on” from efforts for a Russia-Ukraine peace deal if there is no progress in the coming days.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Maryland Sen. Van Hollen meets with Abrego Garcia in El Salvador amid court fight over US return
item.description: SAN SALVADOR (AP) — Maryland Sen. Chris Van Hollen met with Kilmar Abrego Garcia on Thursday evening in El Salvador, coming face to face with the wrongly deported man after two days in the country pushing for his release.
item.dc:creator: YOLANDA MAGAÑA and MARY CLARE JALONICK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Rubio and Witkoff met Ukrainian and European officials for landmark talks on Ukraine's future
item.description: PARIS (AP) — France hosted high-level talks Thursday to discuss Ukraine and its security, the first time since President Donald Trump's inauguration that top American, Ukrainian and European officials are known to have met together to discuss an end to the war. U.S.
item.dc:creator: EMMA BURROWS and ANGELA CHARLTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: HUD puts half-occupied headquarters building in DC up for sale
item.description: HUD's headquarters was put on a list of federal assets to be sold, and it is facing hundreds of millions in deferred maintenance costs with only half the building being used.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Letitia James reaps what she sows after leveling 'laughable' case at Trump: expert
item.description: A federal housing agency sent a criminal referral to the Department of Justice Monday arguing New York Attorney General Letitia James appeared to have falsified mortgage records.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Supreme Court to hear rare May arguments in birthright citizenship battle
item.description: The Supreme Court scheduled a rare May oral argument on the Trump administration’s emergency request to narrow a series of nationwide blocks on President Trump’s executive order that would restrict birthright citizenship.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota officials post strong March jobs report, note economic uncertainty ahead
item.description: Economic officials reported job growth in March but noted that mass layoff data likely isn’t represented yet.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Clashing Over Campus Control: Lawmakers vs. DeSantis on transparency
item.description: For years, lawmakers have speculated that the leaders who run the state's Universities and Colleges have been gifted these positions based on their political loyalties to the Governor.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump joins tariff talks with Japan as US seeks deals amid trade wars
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Wednesday inserted himself directly into trade talks with Japanese officials, a sign of the high stakes for the United States after its tariffs rattled the economy and caused the administration to assure the public that it would quickly reach deals.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, MARI YAMAGUCHI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Noem announces cancellation of $2.7 million in grants to Harvard
item.description: “Harvard bending the knee to antisemitism — driven by its spineless leadership — fuels a cesspool of extremist riots and threatens our national security,” Noem said in the release.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: White House invites Rachel Morin's mother to press briefing to share daughter's story
item.description: The mother of a Maryland woman who was killed by an individual who entered the country illegally addressed reporters at the White House on Wednesday as the Trump administration seeks to go on offense over the case of an individual who was mistakenly deported to El Salvador.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Wisconsin squeaks past Minnesota for the top spot in voter turnout
item.description: The Minnesota Secretary of State confirms Wisconsin narrowly surpassed Minnesota with voter turnout in the 2024 election.
item.dc:creator: Clay Masters and Peter Cox, MPR News

item.title: Biden, Obama-appointed judges oversee bulk of Trump cases
item.description: The Gavel is The Hill's courts newsletter. Sign up by clicking here or adding your email in the box below.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: Hegseth adviser put on leave amid leaks probe
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth’s adviser was escorted out of the Pentagon on Tuesday and put on administrative leave amid a probe into information leaks at the department.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Keri Heintzeman wins Republican primary in race to fill Justin Eichorn’s state Senate seat
item.description: The winner of the April 29 special election will fill the District 6 seat left vacant by Justin Eichorn, who resigned last month after he was charged with soliciting a minor.
item.dc:creator: Kirsti Marohn, MPR News

item.title: Kilmar Abrego Garcia's lawyer says no proof of MS-13 affiliation
item.description: Kilmar Abrego Garcia's attorney, Benjamin Osorio, joined "CUOMO" for a live exclusive interview to discuss his client's status.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: NIL payments OK at UNLV, UNR, but payment amounts secret under SB293
item.description: A bill concerning NIL — name, image, likeness — and how UNLV and UNR can manage contracts directly with players passed on Tuesday in the Nevada Senate, advancing to the Assembly with other bills. A Republican leader objected to secrecy surrounding the payment amounts.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump assassination plot part of domestic terrorism rise: Ex-FBI
item.description: Ex-FBI special agent Stuart Kaplan joined "NewsNation Now" to discuss how it is increasing across the United States, largely thanks to social media.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: 281 bills fall victim to deadline at Nevada Legislature. Here are the highlights
item.description: A total of 281 bills missed a Friday deadline to win committee passage in Carson City, the first major deadline at the Nevada Legislature this session. If that seems like a lot, consider that 875 bills are still alive.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Getting the IRS on the phone is more difficult this tax filing season, experts say
item.description: Taxpayers calling the IRS for help processing their taxes this filing season may find it harder than normal to get someone on the phone.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: A retrial of Sarah Palin's case against 'New York Times' begins Monday
item.description: Former Alaska Gov. Sarah Palin has the rare opportunity to retry her defamation case against The New York Times even though she lost it — twice in a 24-hour-period — in early 2022.
item.dc:creator: David Folkenflik, MPR News

item.title: Trump admin tells judge man wrongly deported to El Salvador is alive, still detained
item.description: On Friday, federal judge Paula Xinis had ordered the Trump administration to provide daily updates to return Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia to the United States.
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster, MPR News
